subject: reliant to do cost benefit study

emails.subject: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.subject_base: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.body: Reliant to do cost benefit study Marchris said that Reliant is going to do an RTO cost benefit study for the SE. I have not contacted Reliant. We may want to think about whether we continue to do our own or consider going in with Reliant.

emails.subject: RE: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.subject_base: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.body: RE: Reliant to do cost benefit study Who at Reliant said this??? I'd let them go forward and we'll do our own. Jim To: Steffes, James D.; Shapiro, Richard; Robertson, Linda; Novosel, Sarah

emails.subject: RE: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.subject_base: Reliant to do cost benefit study
emails.body: Marchris heard John Orr. To: Nicolay, Christi L.; Robinson, Marchris
